_doc: FROZEN GOLDEN — captured 2026-06-10 from the live PreMortemKind class (pre-deletion), F3 lote-1. Deep-equaled against the descriptor-synthesized port in test_lote1_descriptor_equivalence.py. POST-CAPTURE EDIT (censo-12-kinds, 2026-07-20): identity.docs / identity.display_label / schema descriptions were re-synced from the descriptor after prose-only corrections (removed claims of producers/verifiers that do not ship in this distribution; disambiguated the three 'Insight' display labels). No Kind identity, field, type, requiredness, default or enum changed.

identity.docs: A PreMortem rewinds a Story's history and asks what would have happened on the other branch. Intended to be generated by a deep-sleep hindsight hook after Stories ship/cancel — that hook does NOT ship in this distribution, so PreMortems are authored by hand (`dna doc make PreMortem`). Verifiable in principle: would_have_changed predictions are meant to be compared against current state at outcome_check_at, but no verifier ships either.

alternative.description: Prose: 'If instead of <outcome>, the Story had <other path>, then...'. 2-4 sentences.

divergence_point.description: Decision/event that branched the timeline. Cite a date or trigger event.

evidence_against.description: Doc refs that complicate the counterfactual.

outcome_check_at.description: When the author intends to verify. No automatic loop ships in this distribution.

source_story.description: Slug of the Story being rewritten (e.g. 's-foo-bar').

verifications.description: Verification trace. Written by the author — no verifier ships in this distribution to auto-populate it.

would_have_changed.description: Predictions same shape as SynthesisRun.would_change. Verifiable via same measure_metrics path.

out.alternative: If instead of done, the Story had been dropped, then…

spec.alternative: If instead of done, the Story had been dropped, then…
